name: whatsapp-broadcaster
description: WhatsApp broadcasting tool served as a local web UI

scripts.build:mac: bun build --compile --external typescript --target=bun-darwin-arm64 ./server.js --outfile dist/whatsapp-broadcaster-darwin-arm64 && bun build --compile --external typescript --target=bun-darwin-x64 ./server.js --outfile dist/whatsapp-broadcaster-darwin-x64
